landing.meta.title: Scrumboy
landing.meta.description: Scrumboy hukupa bodi za miradi za self-hosted au bodi za anonymous za papo hapo kwa ushirikiano wa haraka.
landing.deploy.title: Endesha kwenye seva yako mwenyewe.
landing.deploy.text: Self-host. Customize. Kwa solo dev au timu ndogo.
landing.anon.title: Tengeneza bodi sasa.
landing.anon.text: Hakuna kulazimishwa kufungua akaunti. Hakuna ritua ya setup. Tengeneza bodi, shiriki linki na yeyote.
landing.features.selfHosted.title: open-source
landing.features.selfHosted.text: Suluhisho la 100% bure, self-hosted, salama na la faragha.
landing.features.realtime.title: realtime collaboration
landing.features.realtime.text: Ushirikiano wa live na updates za bodi papo hapo.
landing.features.stickyWall.title: sticky wall
landing.features.stickyWall.text: Brainstorming, noti, na kupanga kwa uhuru kwenye canvas ya mtindo wa Postbaby.org.
landing.features.anonymousBoards.title: anonymous boards
landing.features.anonymousBoards.text: Tengeneza bodi papo hapo ikiwa na linki yake ya kushiriki. Shiriki na yeyote ili mshirikiane.
landing.features.mcp.title: MCP integrations
landing.features.mcp.text: Automate kwa kutumia AI agents na tools kupitia Claude, n.k.
landing.features.pwa.title: PWA + notifications
landing.features.voice.title: voice commands
landing.features.voice.text: Dhibiti bodi yako kwa amri za sauti za kawaida.
landing.features.sso.title: 2FA, OIDC/SSO
landing.features.sso.text: Tumia na OIDC providers kama Keycloak na Traefik.
landing.features.customization.title: customization
landing.features.customization.text: Light/dark themes, wallpapers, keybindings, na custom tags.
landing.features.audit.title: auditing support
landing.features.audit.text: Historia imara, append-only na uwajibikaji wazi.
landing.features.multilingual.title: multilingual support
landing.features.multilingual.text: Tumia Scrumboy kwa Kiswahili na lugha nyingine nyingi.
landing.features.markdown.title: markdown + mermaid
landing.features.markdown.text: Tumia Markdown na Mermaid diagrams kwenye maelezo ya task.
landing.footer.disclaimer: Scrumboy haihusiani, haifadhiliwi, wala haijaidhinishwa na Scrum.org, Scrum Alliance, Inc., au shirika lolote linalohusiana na Scrum training au certification; pia haihusiani wala haijaidhinishwa na Mermaid diagramming and charting software.

settings.customization.wallpaper.descrip: Mandhari ya hiari nyuma ya app. Kifuniko chepesi husaidia maandishi yasomeke. Bodi na kadi hubaki solid; Mipangilio inaweza kuonyesha wallpaper ikiwa imewashwa.
settings.customization.wallpaper.signInH: Ingia ili kutumia picha maalum. Rangi moja na Imezimwa hufanya kazi bila kuingia.
settings.customization.notifications.des: Arifa za OS mtu anapokupangia Todo (hufanya kazi hata tab hii ikiwa background).
settings.customization.notifications.sta: Imewashwa — utapokea arifa za OS kwa assignments mpya.
Imezuiwa — ruhusu arifa za tovuti hii kwenye mipangilio ya kivinjari.
Bado haijawashwa — bonyeza kitufe hapa chini (kivinjari kitakuomba ruhusa).
settings.customization.notifications.toa: Arifa zimezuiwa. Unaweza kuziruhusu kwenye mipangilio ya kivinjari kwa tovuti hii.

settings.customization.keybindings.descr: Bofya key ili kurekodi shortcut mpya. Bonyeza Esc ili kughairi wakati inasikiliza.

settings.tagColors.description: Weka rangi maalum kwa tags. Rangi zitaonekana kwenye chips za filter na kadi za Todo.

settings.customization.push.title: Arifa za mandharinyuma (PWA)
settings.customization.push.description: Arifa mtu anapokupangia Todo wakati app iko background au imefungwa (inafanya kazi vizuri zaidi kwenye PWA iliyosakinishwa). Inahitaji VAPID keys kwenye server. Ikiwa imewekwa, kuingia kutajaribu kusubscribe automatically (kivinjari kinaweza kuomba ruhusa). Tumia toggle kuwasha au kuzima Web Push kwa kivinjari hiki tu.
settings.customization.push.vapidNotice: Web Push inahitaji VAPID keys kwenye seva (SCRUMBOY_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY na SCRUMBOY_VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY; angalia docs).
settings.customization.push.anonymousNot: Web Push haipatikani katika hali ya anonymous.
settings.customization.push.unsupported: Web Push haitumiki kwenye kivinjari hiki.
settings.customization.push.toast.enable: Imeshindwa kuwasha Web Push. Ruhusu arifa au angalia usanidi wa VAPID kwenye seva.
todo.fields.title: Kichwa
todo.links.addPrompt: Andika #id au kichwa, kisha bonyeza Ongeza
todo.links.cannotShare: Haiwezi kushiriki: hakuna story katika muktadha
todo.markdownPreview.renderFailed: Imeshindwa kurender Mermaid diagram. Inaonyesha source badala yake.
todo.markdownPreview.directivesOnly: Block hii ya Mermaid ina ignored Mermaid directives pekee. Inaonyesha source badala yake.
todo.markdownPreview.tooManyDiagrams: Ni Mermaid diagrams {count} za kwanza tu ndizo zinarenderiwa kwenye note preview. Inaonyesha source badala yake.
todo.markdownPreview.diagramTooLarge: Mermaid diagram hii imezidi kikomo cha preview cha herufi {count}. Inaonyesha source badala yake.
todo.markdownPreview.budgetExceeded: Note hii imezidi budget ya Mermaid preview ya herufi {count}. Inaonyesha source badala yake.
todo.tags.placeholder: Andika tag kisha bonyeza Enter au Tab
tooltips.boardSearch: Tafuta vichwa na maelezo. Changanya na tag na sprint chips ili kupunguza kinachoonekana kwenye bodi.
tooltips.doneLane: Safu moja tu huhesabiwa kama Done. Stories zilizo hapo hupata completion timestamp inayotumika kwenye dashboard stats na burndown, hata kama safu inaitwa Shipped badala ya Done.
tooltips.estimationPoints: Hizi ni juhudi za kulinganisha, si saa. Hutumia modified Fibonacci scale (1–40). Linganisha na kazi zinazofanana kwenye bodi hii.
tooltips.linkedStories: Unganisha stories zinazohusiana (dependencies, parent/child, duplicates). Tafuta kwa local ID (#12) au kichwa. Links ni za taarifa tu — hazihamishi kadi automatically.
tooltips.memberRole: Viewer: kusoma tu. Contributor: kuhariri maelezo akipewa kazi. Maintainer: kuunda, kuhamisha, kupanga, kusimamia Sprints na Settings.
tooltips.sprintDefaultWeeks: Unapotengeneza Sprint, tarehe ya mwisho huwekwa default kuwa wiki hizi baada ya tarehe ya kuanza.
tooltips.sprintEnd: Mwisho uliopangwa wa Sprint hii. Burndown na takwimu za ukamilifu za dashboard hutumia masafa ya tarehe za Sprint.
tooltips.sprintFilterActive: Iteration inayoendelea sasa — Sprint moja tu inaweza kuwa active kwa wakati mmoja.
tooltips.sprintFilterUnscheduled: Stories ambazo bado hazijawekwa kwenye Sprint (mara nyingi Backlog yako).
tooltips.sprintName: Lebo ya iteration hii, mf. Sprint 12 au 2026 Q1 Sprint 1.
tooltips.sprintStart: Mwanzo uliopangwa wa Sprint hii. Burndown na takwimu za ukamilifu za dashboard hutumia masafa ya tarehe za Sprint.
tooltips.sprintTodo: Story hii iko kwenye iteration gani yenye muda maalum. Acha tupu ikiwa bado haijapangwa.
tooltips.status: Story hii iko kwenye safu gani ya workflow. Done ni safu yoyote iliyowekwa alama kama done kwenye Mipangilio → Workflow; safu hiyo ndiyo inaendesha dashboard completion stats.
tooltips.tags: Lebo huru za kuchuja na kupanga. Kwenye bodi zilizoshirikiwa, rangi za tag ni sawa kwa kila mtu; rangi zako za tag zinatumika kwenye miradi yako yote.
tooltips.voiceCommand: Story na todo zinamaanisha kitu kilekile hapa. Tumia local ID (12, #12) au sehemu ya title. Amri moja wazi kwa kila mstari — usitumie viwakilishi kama it au that.
tooltips.workflowAddLane: Huongeza safu mpya kabla ya safu ya Done. Majina ya safu yanaweza kubadilishwa baadaye; funguo za ndani zinasalia thabiti.
